overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora. The player walks through the 'Weaving Woods Biome' from an open alien meadow toward a Na'vi settlement built around a massive twisted tree, passing colorful flora and flying creatures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alien meadow with windmill structure

events.description: large flying banshee creature enters frame from left and flies overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall alien grass toward the distant tree line

notable_agents.action: flying banshee creature approaching from the left, wings spread wide

entered.detail: wooden structure with flowing red, blue, and orange ribbons spinning in the wind
tall green and purple grass covering the open field
rocky mountain formations floating in the misty background
large winged creature with dark wings and bioluminescent patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide alien meadow with a colorful ribbon windmill spinning on the right. The camera walks forward through tall grass as a large flying banshee creature enters from the left, flying overhead toward the distant twisted trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: path beneath giant alien tree canopy

events.description: moves from open meadow into the shade of massive overhead tree branches
large planet becomes visible through the tree canopy, creating a backlit effect

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path under the sprawling tree branches

notable_agents.action: banshee creature flying away into the distance toward the right

entered.detail: massive twisted branches with green leaves forming a natural roof overhead
large pale planet with rings visible through gaps in the branches
gnarled tree trunk with red and green fabric tied to its branches

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the shade of a giant twisted tree, transitioning from open sky to dappled light. The banshee flies away into the distance as a large ringed planet becomes visible through the canopy. The path continues toward a settlement visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Na'vi settlement at base of giant tree

events.description: arrives at the Na'vi settlement with red fabric structures built around the tree base
slows approach while observing Na'vi characters sitting by the campfire

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement and observing the Na'vi characters gathered by the fire

notable_agents.action: blue Na'vi characters sitting on the ground near a campfire at the tree base

entered.detail: large conical structures made of red and orange woven fabric attached to the tree
small fire burning at the entrance to the main tent structure
tribal gathering area with wooden platforms and hanging decorations

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a Na'vi settlement built around the massive tree trunk, featuring vibrant red fabric tents and a campfire. Two blue Na'vi characters sit near the fire as the camera approaches the entrance of the main structure, revealing the detailed organic architecture of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant alien meadow into the shaded heart of a Na'vi settlement. It begins in an open field of tall grass beside a spinning ribbon windmill, moving forward as a large banshee glides overhead toward a distant cluster of twisted trees. As the camera enters the canopy of a giant tree, the bright open sky transitions into dappled light, momentarily revealing a large ringed planet through the branches. The path then leads deeper into the woods, shifting from the natural forest floor toward a settlement built around a massive trunk. Finally, the scene opens upon a camp of vibrant red fabric tents and a glowing campfire where two Na'vi characters sit, ending as the camera approaches the organic architecture of the main structure.
